definitions.text: NATO, ICAO, ITU IMO radiotelephony code for 10, used only with o'clock to indicate direction.
The number occurring after nine and before eleven, represented in Arabic numerals (base ten) as 10 and in Roman numerals as X.
A set or group with ten elements.
examples: We divided the chocolates into tens to hand out to Hallowe'en visitors.

definitions.text: An inexact quantity, typically understood to be between 20 and 100.
examples: Our houses are tens of meters apart, so we don't have to worry about noise from our neighbours.

definitions.text: A card in a given suit with a value of ten.
